subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest the onslaught of the ignorant upon the chosen ones, and the assaults of the treacherous upon the pure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری هجوم الاغبیاء علی الاصفیاء و تعرض الزنماء بالخلص من
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
